projects.name: v1.1
keyDeliverables: Security & tenant-isolation hardening across auth, cache scoping, and debug endpoints
Performance optimization: aggregation pipelines, parallelized platform syncs, cache normalization
System-wide logging infrastructure for grepable, structured logs
Backend and frontend optimization for faster API response times

projects.name: PostBank Final Release
keyDeliverables: X/Twitter OAuth migration from OAuth 1.0 to OAuth 2.0
AI spend optimization to stay within Google API monthly caps
Manual sentiment override system with preservation across reprocessing
Filter-responsive mention statistics dashboard
Opened/unopened mention tracking and attended/unattended comment records
Thread loading optimization through caching
Database backup/restore automation and off-server data management

projects.name: PostBank Trial Version
keyDeliverables: AI sentiment analysis model fine-tuned for English + Sesotho code-switching
AI layer with endpoints for sentiment classification, reply suggestions, and negative-trend alerts
Multiplatform posting, scheduling, and recurring scheduling API
Feed view for mentions with reply interaction capabilities
LinkedIn video upload pipeline (Standard Tier API upgrade)
Mentions grouped by unread/new indicators and sentiment-based reporting
Privacy policy and terms of service pages
Sidebar UX rationalization and logo rebranding
Sentiment markers on mentions and comments for triage
Clickable sentiment feedback linking to filtered mentions
Search result filtering fix
Facebook comment deep link reconstruction using FBID
Expanded Facebook mention/comment coverage on LPB feeds
Sorting and filtering enhancements (intensity, date, platform)
Web search engine migration to Serper with AI triage
MailerSend email notification integration
AI analysis pipeline fix for mention and listening results
Meta App rate limit investigation and optimization
Sesotho sentiment benchmarking across frontier and lower-tier models
Cross-platform content length workaround for Twitter
Platform filtering fix under Web tab with Most Severe sort
Mentions update delay investigation and webhook-based sync
Feature parity between Web and Mentions filtering UIs

projects.name: Other / Unassigned
keyDeliverables: LinkedIn hashtag rendering fix
TikTok platform filter removal when not enabled
Title bar UX improvement: logo + company name
Dev server deployment to Lando infrastructure
Railway MongoDB migration investigation
Multi-platform account following configuration (Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter)
LinkedIn mentions search investigation and documentation
V1.0 must-have feature porting to new API

skillsDemonstrated: AI/ML: Fine-tuning LLMs for low-resource language sentiment analysis (Sesotho)
System architecture: Multi-tenancy isolation, caching strategies, rate limiting
DevOps: Deployment, migration, backup automation, infrastructure management
API integration: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Google AI, MailerSend, Serper
Performance optimization: Aggregation pipelines, parallel processing, cache normalization
UX/UI: Dashboard analytics, filtering, sorting, responsive design
Security: Authentication hardening, tenant data isolation, debug endpoint protection
